testcase.name: test_simple_ispu_order_logged_in[chromium]

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: <element(s) not found> Call log: LocatorAssertions.to_be_visible with timeout 5000ms - waiting for get_by_text("Boston")

testcase.failure:
self = <test_ispu_logged_in.TestBaselineISPULoggedIn object at 0x7fdff660af90> page = <Page url='https://development.thereformation.com/products/melanie-top/1313793IVO.html?dwvar_1313793IVO_color=IVO&dwvar_1313793IVO_size_clothing=004&quantity=1'> env_host = 'dev'
@pytest.mark.baseline @pytest.mark.bug_fix @pytest.mark.bug_fix_ispu @pytest.mark.bug_fix_checkout @pytest.mark.bug_fix_checkout_single_product def test_simple_ispu_order_logged_in(self, page, env_host = os.environ['ENV_HOST']): self.ref_logger.info('Started test_simple_ispu_order_logged_in')
site_navigation = NavigationCommon()
ref_common = REFCommon() ref_common.spoof_attentive_cookie(page)
# 0 set up ISPU inventory for the test product ispu_product = ISPUProduct(env_host)
# 1 HIT THE PDP AND LOGIN site_navigation.navigate_to_pdp_and_login(page, env_host, ispu_product.pdp_url) page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
# 2 INITIAL SETUP -- OPEN THE MINICART, GET THE BASKET ID AND DELETE THE BASKET, IF IT EXISTS ref_common.delete_existing_basket(page, env_host) page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
# 3 GO BACK TO THE PDP AND START THE TEST site_navigation.navigate_to_pdp(page, ispu_product.pdp_url)
# 4 ADD AN ISPU ITEM TO BAG ispu_common = ISPUCommon() > ispu_common.add_ispu_item_to_bag(page, env_host, ispu_product)
src/baseline/in_store_pickup/test_ispu_logged_in.py:50: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/common/in_store_pickup/ispu_common.py:55: in add_ispu_item_to_bag pdp.add_sized_item_with_instore_pickup_to_bag(ispu_product.product['size'], test_store_zipcode, test_store_name, ) src/common/pages/ecom/product_display_page.py:200: in add_sized_item_with_instore_pickup_to_bag self.choose_ispu_store(store_location, store_name) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <src.common.pages.ecom.product_display_page.ProductDisplayPage object at 0x7fdff496a710> store_location = '02115', store_name = 'Boston'
def choose_ispu_store(self, store_location, store_name = None): self.store_location_search.fill(store_location) self.find_stores_btn.click()
# Probably need to move this self.page.wait_for_timeout(3000) # make sure that at least 1 store was returned # otherwise Store pick up popup displays something like this for the product: # # Bad news. We’re not seeing Medium Rosetta # Shoulder Bag in Boss Suede and size OS available # for pickup near you. expect(self.page.get_by_text("Bad news.")).not_to_be_visible()
# eg. zipcode 10012 has more than 1 store, need to be more specific for location in some cases if store_name: store_name_radio_button = self.page.get_by_text(store_name) > expect(store_name_radio_button).to_be_visible() E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: <element(s) not found> E Call log: E LocatorAssertions.to_be_visible with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for get_by_text("Boston")
src/common/pages/ecom/product_display_page.py:184: AssertionError

ref_common = REFCommon() ref_common.spoof_attentive_cookie(page)
# 0 set up ISPU inventory for the test product ispu_product = ISPUProduct(env_host)
# 2 GO TO THE PDP AND START THE TEST site_navigation = NavigationCommon() site_navigation.navigate_to_pdp(page, ispu_product.pdp_url)
# 3 ADD AN ISPU ITEM TO BAG ispu_common = ISPUCommon() > ispu_common.add_ispu_item_to_bag(page, env_host, ispu_product)

# Probably need to move this self.page.wait_for_timeout(3000) # make sure that at least 1 store was returned # otherwise Store pick up popup displays something like this for the product: # # Bad news. We’re not seeing Medium Rosetta # Shoulder Bag in Boss Suede and size OS available # for pickup near you. expect(self.page.get_by_text("Bad news.")).not_to_be_visible()

testcase.name: test_simple_sfs_order_logged_out[chromium]

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: waiting for get_by_role("button", name="Continue as guest")

testcase.failure:
self = <test_sfs_logged_out.TestBaselineSFSLoggedOut object at 0x7fdff665d8d0> page = <Page url='https://development.thereformation.com/checkout-login?pageType=Category%20Page&checkoutInitiationSource=Bag%20Widget'> env_host = 'dev'
@pytest.mark.baseline @pytest.mark.bug_fix @pytest.mark.bug_fix_sfs @pytest.mark.bug_fix_checkout @pytest.mark.bug_fix_checkout_single_product def test_simple_sfs_order_logged_out(self, page, env_host = os.environ['ENV_HOST']): self.ref_logger.info('Started test_simple_sfs_order_logged_out')
ref_common = REFCommon() ref_common.spoof_attentive_cookie(page)
# 0 set up sfs inventory for the test product sfs_product = SFSProduct(env_host)
# 1 GO TO THE PDP AND START THE TEST site_navigation = NavigationCommon() site_navigation.navigate_to_pdp(page, sfs_product.pdp_url)
# 2 ADD AN sfs ITEM TO BAG ref_common.add_item_to_bag(page, sfs_product.product)
sfs_common_logged_out = SFSCommonLoggedOut() # 3 OPEN THE MINICART AGAIN, GET THE BASKET_ID, LOOKUP THE BASKET VIA OCAPI, AND ASSERT THE VALUES AGAINST OUR BASKET PYTEST sfs_common_logged_out.retrieve_and_assert_initial_basket_values(page, env_host)
page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
landing_page = LandingPage(page) landing_page.view_bag()
> sfs_common_logged_out.proceed_to_checkout_and_verify_sfs_order(page, env_host, us_credentials_and_address["address"]["billing"])
src/baseline/ship_from_store/test_sfs_logged_out.py:50: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/common/ship_from_store/sfs_common_logged_out.py:60: in proceed_to_checkout_and_verify_sfs_order order_json = self.proceed_to_checkout_and_retrieve_final_order(page, env_host, billing_address) src/common/ship_from_store/sfs_common_logged_out.py:52: in proceed_to_checkout_and_retrieve_final_order self.checkout_from_minicart_free_shipping(page, billing_address) src/common/ship_from_store/sfs_common_logged_out.py:31: in checkout_from_minicart_free_shipping navigation_common.checkout_from_minicart(page, billing_address) src/common/navigation_common.py:92: in checkout_from_minicart checkout_signin_page.continue_as_guest() src/common/pages/ecom/checkout_sign_in_page.py:53: in continue_as_guest self.continue_as_guest_btn.click() /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15398: in click self._sync( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:156: in click return await self._frame.click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:488: in click await self._channel.send("click", locals_to_params(locals())) /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:59: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <playwright._impl._connection.Connection object at 0x7fdff6667e90> cb = <function Channel.send.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7fdff4a0d300> is_internal = False
async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr(task, "__pw_stack__", inspect.stack()) parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E waiting for get_by_role("button", name="Continue as guest")
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:520: TimeoutError

testcase.name: test_sfs_double_ship_charge_logged_out[chromium]

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: waiting for get_by_role("button", name="Continue as guest")

testcase.failure:
self = <test_sfs_double_ship_charge_logged_out.TestSFSDoubleShipChargeLoggedOut object at 0x7fdff6521550> page = <Page url='https://development.thereformation.com/checkout-login?pageType=Home%20Page&checkoutInitiationSource=Bag%20Widget'> env_host = 'dev'
@pytest.mark.bug_fix @pytest.mark.bug_fix_sfs @pytest.mark.bug_fix_checkout @pytest.mark.bug_fix_checkout_single_product def test_sfs_double_ship_charge_logged_out(self, page, env_host = os.environ['ENV_HOST']): # Steps from: https://thereformation.atlassian.net/browse/ENG-45318
self.ref_logger.info('Started test_sfs_double_ship_charge_logged_out')
ref_common = REFCommon() ref_common.spoof_attentive_cookie(page)
# 0 set up sfs inventory for the test product sfs_product = SFSProduct(env_host)
# 1 GO TO THE PDP AND START THE TEST navigation_common = NavigationCommon() navigation_common.navigate_to_pdp(page, sfs_product.pdp_url)
ref_common.add_item_to_bag(page, sfs_product.product)
# 2 CONTINUE TO CHECKOUT AND VERIFY THAT ONLY FREE SHIPPING SHOWS IN SHIPPING OPTIONS pdp = ProductDisplayPage(page) pdp.view_homepage()
landing_page = LandingPage(page) page.wait_for_timeout(2000) landing_page.view_bag() page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
> navigation_common.checkout_from_minicart(page, us_credentials_and_address["address"]["billing"])
src/tests/ecom/bug_fixes/ENG_46123_double_shipping_charges_on_SFS_shipments/test_sfs_double_ship_charge_logged_out.py:55: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/common/navigation_common.py:92: in checkout_from_minicart checkout_signin_page.continue_as_guest() src/common/pages/ecom/checkout_sign_in_page.py:53: in continue_as_guest self.continue_as_guest_btn.click() /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15398: in click self._sync( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:156: in click return await self._frame.click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:488: in click await self._channel.send("click", locals_to_params(locals())) /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:59: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <playwright._impl._connection.Connection object at 0x7fdff6667e90> cb = <function Channel.send.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7fdff4b66fc0> is_internal = False
async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr(task, "__pw_stack__", inspect.stack()) parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E waiting for get_by_role("button", name="Continue as guest")
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.11/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:520: TimeoutError
